<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Register a knowledge base file"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v1/knowledge-base/files"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Register a file for knowledge base ingestion

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"fileId":{"type":"string"},"displayName":{"type":"string"}},"required":["fileId","displayName"]}}},"required":true}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  responses={{"201":{"description":"Default Response","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"id":{"type":"string"}},"required":["id"],"additionalProperties":false}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
